title: Narrative Ontology — Scenario Definition
description: One persona-scenario record. Eleven scenarios ship in v0.1 (six 'novel.*' for the Novel Author Anna; five 'lyric.*' for the Organist / Lyric Architect Otto). New scenarios go through the proposal procedure declared in tasks/015-integrate-dramatica-ncp-skills/task.md § Scenario Taxonomy Rules.

persona.description: Which working persona owns the scenario. 'novel' = Novel Author Anna (consumes via novel-architect); 'lyric' = Organist / Lyric Architect Otto (consumes via the-agency-system-architect + suno-lyric-writer).

summary.description: Token-cheap explanation of the working scenario. Schema enforces ≤200 chars; the prose convention enforces ≤25 words.

created.description: ISO-8601 date when the scenario was added to v0.1 of scenarios.json.

deprecated.description: OPTIONAL. true if this scenario is deprecated and SHOULD NOT be used for new tags. Existing tags remain so audit history is preserved.
